The application proposes two new commercial/industrial condominium buildings ranging in height from 7.9 to 8.9 metres, with a total of 21 units and 5,024 square metres of floor space. Two new private driveways are proposed from Albion Road in the south and from Codlin Crescent in the north, providing access to the site, its surface parking lot, and commercial/industrial loading spaces. Landscape strips are proposed adjacent to public streets.

Proposed 50-storey mixed-use building that would include retail uses at grade, two levels of community space on Levels 2 and 3, and residential units within the base building and tower. The proposed development has a gross floor area (GFA) of approximately 47,336 square metres, consisting of approximately 45,471 square metres of residential GFA and 1,865 square metres of non-residential GFA, including community and retail space, resulting in an overall density of 14.1 FSI.

Site Plan Control Application proposes the development of a 13-storey residential retirement building. The building will provide a total of 208 residential units, being a mix of studio, 1-bedroom, 1 bedroom + den, and 2-bedroom. The retirement residence will offer a range of living options, including memory care, assisted living, independent living, and rental replacement units. A paved access from Alexandra Blvd along the west property line will be provided, leading to 1 level of below-grade parking, providing a total of 24 parking spaces; as well as 35 bicycle parking spaces. The proposed development provides a total GFA of 20,860 square metres and a FSI of 6.93. Additionally, the proposed development provides 3,325.00 square metres of indoor amenity space and 1,023.00 square metres of outdoor amenity space.

This is a substantially amended Zoning Amendment application submitted to address City concerns regardng the previous proposal for a 56-storey residential building.  The application has been appealed to the Ontario Municipal Board (OMB).  The revised proposal is for a 23-storey commerical building with retail and office uses with an overall height (including the mechanical penthouse) of 103.5 metres.  Vehicular parking is proposed to be located below grade, with 31 spaces to be provided in a four level automated parking system.

Site Plan Application for the second phase of the Newtonbrook Plaza development.  Block 2 proposes a total gross floor area of 66,838.9 square metres, consisting of 63,152.3 square metres of residential GFA and 3,628.0 square metres of commercial GFA.  The proposed mixed use building would contain two towers on a shared podium. One tower will be 34 storeys (106.3 metres excluding the mechanical penthouse) and the other proposed tower would be 40 storeys (123.5 metres excluding the mechanical penthouse). A total of 856 residential units are proposed with 543 vehicular parking spaces.  A new community centre and child care centre are also proposed as part of Phase 2.

Proposed redevelopment of the existing Petro Canada gas station. The proposed development includes the construction of a new gas bar with a convenience store, an accessory drive-through restaurant and EV parking spaces.

The proposed development contemplates the redevelopment of the subject site for a waste transfer and sorting facility, to construct a quonset shed with a four-layer concrete block foundation which is approximately 1405.50 sq.m in area, a container office, 28.98 sq.m in area and a scale house that is 28.98 sq.m in area. The total site coverage of the proposed development totals 20.34 percent.

OPA & Rezoning Application proposes the development of a 49-storey residential building. The building will provide a total of 504 residential units, being a mix of studio, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom units.  A paved access from Avondale Ave will be provided, leading to 4 levels of below-grade parking, providing a total of 70 parking spaces; as well as 190 bicycle parking spaces. The proposed development provides a total GFA of 32,731.02 square metres and a FSI of 28.6. Additionally, the proposed development provides 812 square metres of indoor amenity space and 700 square metres of outdoor amenity space.
